source_script_line: A PA speaker glitches a half-second; Moodz watches Static flinch.
staging_intent: Static small mid-hallway directly under the speaker array, caught mid-flinch; Moodz nearer camera at the puddle, still, just watching. The empty hallway depth between them isolates the flinch.

characters.asset_note: Confused variant reads as the half-second flinch -- head engaged, body uncertain.
characters.action: flinching at the glitched PA burst
characters.body_orientation: three-quarter, caught turning toward the speakers

characters.asset_note: Thinking pose: quiet observation, hand near chin -- watching, not reacting.
characters.body_orientation: angled toward Static up the hallway

ground_contact.surface: wet tile at the main hallway puddle
